fixtures._comment: D5 probe pill ("Show me a pie chart of revenue by category") — 2nd leg: keyed on the render_pie_chart tool id. Ordered ABOVE the 1st-leg. Follow-up MUST contain tokens "pie" and "chart" (d5-gen-ui-custom PIE_CHART_FOLLOWUP_TOKENS).

match.userMessage: Show me a pie chart of revenue by category

response.content: Pie chart rendered above — Electronics is the largest slice, followed by Clothing, Food, and Books.

fixtures._comment: D5 probe pill — 1st leg: emit render_pie_chart tool call (frontend useComponent renders the SVG donut).

match.userMessage: Show me a pie chart of revenue by category

toolCalls.name: render_pie_chart
toolCalls.arguments: {"title":"Revenue by Category","description":"Revenue breakdown by product category (Q4)","data":[{"label":"Electronics","value":42000},{"label":"Clothing","value":28000},{"label":"Food","value":18000},{"label":"Books","value":12000}]}

fixtures._comment: e2e-typed bar chart ("Show me a bar chart of monthly expenses") — 2nd leg.

response.content: Bar chart rendered above — monthly expenses across the period. Values are illustrative samples.

fixtures._comment: Sales bar chart suggestion pill — 2nd leg.

match.userMessage: bar chart of quarterly sales for Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4

response.content: Bar chart rendered above — sales grew quarter over quarter, with Q4 the strongest. Values are illustrative samples.

response.content: Pie chart rendered above — Apple and Samsung lead, with Xiaomi and Oppo close behind. Values are illustrative samples.
